subcodes.first_line: O ye who are associated with this Herald of Truth! His honor Ibn-i-Abhar hath forsaken comfort and repose, and from his familiar homeland [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منتسبان این منادی حق جناب ابن ابهر ترک راحت و حضور نمودند و از وطن مالوف
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God
